case_title: HERTERICH MARGOT VS DAWSON HELEN et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERTERICH MARGOT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAWSON HELEN DAWSON & BROLAN REALTORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
